hero.subtitle: Be the next one to enter the cabin

about.title: The Cabin
about.lead: Since 2001, Dans Ma Cabane has offered musicians and creators a stable, accessible, and inspiring place.
about.body: Our mission is to preserve a genuine space dedicated to musical creation in Liège, where artists can work under good conditions, freely, with special attention to respect, safety, comfort and sound quality.
about.body2: More than just a set of rehearsal rooms, Dans Ma Cabane is a place of encounter, exchange, and continuity for the local music scene for over 20 years.

cta.title: Ready to create?
cta.subtitle: Join the community and book your space today.

localesInfo.label: The building
localesInfo.title: Rehearsal Rooms
localesInfo.lead: Entirely dedicated to musicians and bands, active for over 20 years.

conditions.title: Monthly rental
conditions.body1: The premises are let unfurnished. The rent may be shared between several musicians or bands, provided that the occupants are registered and included in the lease in accordance with the terms of the tenancy agreement.
conditions.body2: The space is usually fully booked, enquiries should be made by contacting us and providing a brief outline of the musical project.

localesInfo.contact: For more information or to arrange a visit, send us a few details about your band or how you plan to use the space.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question? A booking? We're here.
